column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up in awe at illuminated night cherry blossoms" | TEXT="すごく綺麗" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a paper lantern softly glowing" | TEXT="幻想的ですね" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling mysteriously in the dark" | TEXT="ふふ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to a beautiful branch" | TEXT="見て！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Closing eyes, feeling the night breeze" | TEXT="夜風が気持ちいい" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking over shoulder elegantly" | TEXT="行きましょうか" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Offering hand" | TEXT="こっちです" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully on the path" | TEXT="静かですね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking warmly at the person" | TEXT="ずっと見ていたい"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Shivering slightly in the night cold" | TEXT="少し冷えますね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Wrapping shawl tighter" | TEXT="ぶるっ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised, receiving someone's warm coat" | TEXT="えっ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking shy and happy" | TEXT="ありがとうございます" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a hot drink" | TEXT="温かい" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Sneezing softly" | TEXT="くしゅん" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing nose playfully" | TEXT="恥ずかしい" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking worried" | TEXT="風邪ひかないでね" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding gently" | TEXT="はい"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a photo of the night sakura" | TEXT="上手く撮れない" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking puzzled at the camera screen" | TEXT="暗いなぁ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking excited, asking for help" | TEXT="手伝って？" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a thumbs up" | TEXT="さすがです！" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands lightly" | TEXT="お見事" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a selfie together" | TEXT="はいチーズ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the selfie and laughing" | TEXT="いい笑顔" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Pouting cutely" | TEXT="私変な顔" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Sticking tongue out" | TEXT="もう一回！"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sad, checking the time" | TEXT="もうこんな時間" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking reluctant to leave" | TEXT="帰りたくないな" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking down holding sleeves" | TEXT="うう…" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up hopefully" | TEXT="また来ようね？" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping a happy tear" | TEXT="うんうん" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an OK sign cheerfully" | TEXT="約束！" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Linking pinky fingers" | TEXT="ゆびきりげんまん" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling purely" | TEXT="絶対だよ" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Waving goodbye" | TEXT="また明日"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking tired, yawning" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing eyes" | TEXT="眠くなってきちゃった" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching arms out" | TEXT="ふぅ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking apologetic" | TEXT="ごめんね" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing lightly" | TEXT="お先です" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Turning back with a smile" | TEXT="ありがとうね" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Sending a flying kiss" | TEXT="ちゅ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Running away blushing" | TEXT="きゃー" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Hiding face with sleeve" | TEXT="恥ずかしいっ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised at falling petals" | TEXT="花吹雪" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Catching a petal in hands" | TEXT="捕まえた" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Making a wish holding the petal" | TEXT="願い事" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling peacefully" | TEXT="叶うといいな" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking determined" | TEXT="がんばる" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Raising fist softly" | TEXT="エイエイオー" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply and elegantly" | TEXT="大変お世話になりました" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Waving with both hands warmly" | TEXT="さようなら" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up gratefully" | TEXT="おやすみなさい"
